pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add import for the new Java 17+ @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available in Java 17 without this import, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Without @Serial, the serialVersionUID field may trigger warnings or errors depending on compiler settings regarding serialization proxy patterns and explicit serialization control.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID is a serial persistent field and must be annotated with @Serial in Java 17+.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 17+.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile with --enable-preview or strict linting rules enabled in the target JDK environment.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io in Java 21; without the import, the code will not compile.
